name: uniform_boundary
notes: constant tangential speed; c/v=1 but axis vector field is not regular

name: solid_body_boundary
notes: regular core f=x; expected c/v=sqrt(2/3) for constant density

name: smooth_matched_poly
family: regular core + exterior slope match toy
notes: regular f(0)=0, f(1)=1, f'(1)=-1; smooth bridge toy

name: regularized_inv_r_boundary
notes: regularized exterior-like 1/r; good slope, poor core regularity

name: lamb_oseen_boundary
notes: smooth regular core with circulation-spread parameter sigma, boundary normalized

name: nlse_tanh_density_phase
notes: singular phase velocity but density vanishes at core; weighted energy finite

name: nlse_pade_density_phase
normalization: boundary phase speed + Pade density core
notes: 1/r phase velocity with Pade density depletion

name: gaussian_core_max
notes: peak-normalized central swirl; usually poor boundary circulation

name: gaussian_shell
notes: shell-like swirl concentration away from axis
